{{Infobox character
| name = King (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The King promised to make Sophara's body and spirit anew if she won.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The King is aiding [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The King possesses [[madra]] that allows him to hide from anyone.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“When you win, we will make your body and spirit anew.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“With the King’s madra, you could hide from anyone! Right, Lindon?”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
